actions_taken: NO override changes this tick. Rationale: (i) Book continues IMPROVING — daily P&L +1.17% up from +1.10% at 11:30; cumulative +0.74% extending positive territory; 6 monotone-improving snapshots in a row (₹7,586 → ₹8,704 → ₹10,328 → ₹11,080 → ₹11,828). (ii) ALL 9 pre-armed triggers from 11:30 (A5-I5) DORMANT with measurable buffers; no new firing trigger this tick — same regime as 09:30→10:00→10:30→11:00→11:30. (iii) Strategy cadence remains MEASURED (1 NEW BUY in 2h49m vs Day-5 4-BUYs-in-60-min that originally fired the cap stack); ZERO admissions in 11:30→12:00 for the 6th consecutive 30-min window. (iv) ALL guardrails binding with measurable buffer: deployment 14.96 pp on filled book / 10.19 pp on GLENMARK full-fill; sector caps 9.73+ pp on every cluster (largest is FMCG); position cap 2.73 pp on largest name (NESTLEIND); SL bands all clean with no holding below SL. (v) The only mildly-narrowing vector remains GOLDBEES MTM drift (-1.99% → -2.05% → -2.10%, 5 bps softer for 4th consecutive tick) — captured by Trigger C6 arming line at -3% (0.90 pp residual) and now also by the new J6 line at -2.5% (0.40 pp residual) for earlier observation. Decoratively tightening on a healthy, positive, recently-de-risked book at 12:00 of Day-7 with all 9 triggers dormant would friction the strategy without addressing any live risk vector — same rationale as 09:00→11:30 holds. Current override stack (min_confidence 0.65, max_position_pct 0.15, max_deployed_pct 0.65, default_sl_pct 0.015, min_sl_pct 0.01, max_sl_pct 0.04, daily_loss_limit_pct 0.04, max_sector_pct 0.22) remains correctly calibrated and is NOT relaxed. Pharma full-fill projection (10.00%), GOLDBEES drift, NESTLEIND tick-up to 12.27%, and stale TATAPOWER/PHARMABEES OPENs are noted for OBSERVATION; pre-armed triggers (A6)-(J6) capture the next firing conditions for the 12:30 tick.
